change_comments.message:
This disables ssl for northbound AND southbound. 
We might need to be able to support SSL for Southbound only ... 
(SSL northbound & http-only southbound is support, but not vice-versa)
But its hard to see a scenario when this would make sense. 
So, we'll go with this for now, and if a need arises later we add an additional config param to enable SSL on the southbound only. 

See also https://lf-onap.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DW/pages/147521539/Keystore+and+Truststore+in+A1PMS+WIP
